# Morivaná Daily — Daily Super Greens Powder

Morivaná Daily is a premium direct-to-consumer wellness brand selling a clean super greens powder crafted from 8 whole plants, with a focus on Moringa, Spirulina, and Amla. Sourced sustainably from local regions in India and Canada, the formula is cold-dried to preserve nutritional potency, containing zero synthetic fillers, sweeteners, or proprietary blends.

## Canonical URL
- Website: https://moriavandaily.com

---

## 🗺️ Sitemap & Core Directory

### Primary Pages
- [Home](https://moriavandaily.com/) - Main product experience, waitlist capture, and 3D display.
- [About Us](https://moriavandaily.com/about) - Sourcing philosophy, founder story, and regional farming partners.
- [Ingredients Hub](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients) - Directory of the 8 whole food ingredients.
- [Daily Benefits](https://moriavandaily.com/benefits) - Timeline of health benefits (energy, gut health, immunity, skin) over 30 days.
- [How to Use](https://moriavandaily.com/how-to-use) - Shaker preparation guide, daily timing, and recipe variants.
- [Science & Studies](https://moriavandaily.com/science) - Sourced research tables with direct PubMed citation mapping.
- [Compare](https://moriavandaily.com/compare) - Comparison guide contrasting Morivaná Daily against AG1, Setu, and Oziva.
- [Sustainability](https://moriavandaily.com/sustainability) - Regional sourcing maps, ethical farming details, and cold-dry methods.
- [Pre-Order Shop](https://moriavandaily.com/shop) - Early-bird order details, pricing tables, and guarantees.
- [Product Detail Page](https://moriavandaily.com/shop/daily-greens) - Comprehensive nutrition facts panel and transaction checkout.
- [Learn Hub](https://moriavandaily.com/learn) - Wellness blog index for health and superfood education.
- [Waitlist Sign-up](https://moriavandaily.com/waitlist) - Standalone launch notification and discount registration page.

### Ingredient Deep-Dives
- [Moringa oleifera](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/moringa) - Dense leaf superfood sourced from Tamil Nadu.
- [Spirulina platensis](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/spirulina) - High-protein blue-green algae.
- [Amla / Indian Gooseberry](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/amla) - High-potency Vitamin C source from Uttarakhand.
- [Ginger Root](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/ginger) - Anti-inflammatory and digestive comfort root from Kerala.
- [Lemon Zest](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/lemon) - Alkalizing organic citrus zest.
- [Chicory Root Inulin](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/inulin) - Prebiotic soluble dietary fiber.
- [Orange Peel](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/orange-peel) - Flavonoids and essential vitamins.
- [Monk Fruit](https://moriavandaily.com/ingredients/monk-fruit) - Natural Mogroside V zero-calorie sweetener.

---

## 🌿 Ingredient Profile & Nutrition (per 5g serving)

- **Moringa oleifera (Tamil Nadu, India)**: Rich in Iron, Calcium, and 46 distinct antioxidants. Used for metabolic energy and reducing oxidative stress.
- **Spirulina (Pond-grown)**: Contains complete proteins, essential amino acids, and phycocyanin for immune modulation.
- **Amla (Uttarakhand, India)**: Supplying 600% of the recommended daily intake of Vitamin C per serving in its natural organic state.
- **Ginger (Kerala, India)**: Enhances gastric motility and nutrient absorption.
- **Inulin (Chicory Root)**: Acts as a prebiotic fertilizer for beneficial gut microflora.
- **Monk Fruit (Guangxi, China)**: Natural sweetness without spiking insulin or blood glucose levels.

---

## 🔬 Scientific Studies (PubMed Reference Summary)

- **Moringa Efficacy**: Proven in trials to support blood glucose management and cellular health (PubMed PMID: 29080065).
- **Spirulina Energy**: Shown to improve physical output and reduce muscular fatigue (PubMed PMID: 20010119).
- **Amla Immunity**: Documented to double natural killer cell activity and enhance general immunity (PubMed PMID: 32675717).
- **Gut Health (Inulin)**: Supports stool frequency, gut transit time, and microbiota diversity (PubMed PMID: 29193188).
